name: Seafood Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. Drain canned tuna and flake it. Use instead of shrimp if desired.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the cooked pasta, shrimp or tuna, diced green pepper, sliced carrots, and sliced zucchini.
4. Add Worcestershire sauce, mayonnaise, salt, and pepper to the mixture.
5. Toss lightly to combine all ingredients.
6. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
